summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of DME PROS CRM application. All backend APIs and frontend pages are working correctly. Login flow, dashboard, and navigation to all major pages (Patients, Patient Requests, Orders, Documents, Fax Center, Support Tickets, Stay Up To Date) are functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Login API with super admin credentials (mel@a2gdesigns.com)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns current user info
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns dashboard statistics
Backend: GET /api/patients returns patient list
Backend: GET /api/leads returns patient requests list
Backend: GET /api/orders returns orders list
Backend: GET /api/documents returns documents list
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns suppliers list
Frontend: Landing page loads at '/' with iframe
Frontend: Login page renders at '/login' with email/password form
Frontend: Login flow works with test credentials and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard displays all stats cards (Today, This Week, Monthly sales, Pipeline, Total Patients, Patient Requests, Total Orders, Suppliers)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation items are visible (Dashboard, Patients, Patient Requests, Orders, Support Tickets, Documents, Fax Center, Newsletter)
Frontend: Navigation to Patients page works
Frontend: Navigation to Patient Requests (Leads) page works
Frontend: Navigation to Orders page works
Frontend: Navigation to Documents page works
Frontend: Navigation to Fax Center page works
Frontend: Navigation to Support Tickets page works
Frontend: Navigation to Stay Up To Date page works
Frontend: Public Products page loads at '/products'
Frontend: Public Coverage Areas page loads at '/locations'
notes: All backend API endpoints are working correctly
All frontend pages load and render properly
Login authentication works with test credentials
Dashboard displays all required statistics and sales data
All sidebar navigation items are present and functional
Public pages (Products, Coverage Areas) are accessible
Availity and Waystar API syncs are mocked as expected
No critical issues found during testing
